title: Path of the Survivalist: Stone and Shelter
description: A traveler who relies only on wood will not last long. Stone tools, storage, and a fire-safe hearth make a camp worth keeping.

journalLog.10: The trail has taught me that a camp is more than a place to sleep. I need stone, storage, and a hearth before I can settle anywhere for long.
journalLog.20: My camp now has the bones of a proper shelter: a place for supplies and a furnace for warmth and work.

objectives.description: Craft a chest for spare supplies.
